segments.name: option
segments.comment: Configuration option where the DSU mode will be stored. There are 4 options per port.

verbo_map.comment: if in first slot, address generation for writing to SRAM from input buffer; if in second slot, address generation for writing to SRAM (BULK)
if in first slot, address generation for read from SRAM to output buffer; if in second slot, address generation for reading from SRAM (BULK)

segments.name: init_addr_sd
segments.comment: Is initial address static or dynamic?

segments.name: port
segments.comment: Select which port the repetition applies to.

verbo_map.comment: if in first slot, address generation for writing to SRAM from input buffer; if in second slot, address generation for writing to SRAM (BULK)
if in first slot, address generation for read from SRAM to output buffer; if in second slot, address generation for reading from SRAM (BULK)

segments.name: port
segments.comment: Select which port the repetition extension applies to.

verbo_map.comment: if in first slot, address generation for writing to SRAM from input buffer; if in second slot, address generation for writing to SRAM (BULK)
if in first slot, address generation for read from SRAM to output buffer; if in second slot, address generation for reading from SRAM (BULK)

segments.name: iter
segments.comment: most significant bits to apply to the `iter` value of the repetition operator.

segments.name: step
segments.comment: most significant bits to apply to the `step` value of the repetition operator.

segments.name: delay
segments.comment: most significant bits to apply to the `delay` value of the repetition operator.

segments.name: port
segments.comment: select which port the transition applies to.

verbo_map.comment: if in first slot, address generation for writing to SRAM from input buffer; if in second slot, address generation for writing to SRAM (BULK)
if in first slot, address generation for read from SRAM to output buffer; if in second slot, address generation for reading from SRAM (BULK)
